acceptance_criteria.text: Monthly impact report is built from active pattern events.
Report includes totals, by-type metrics, and key problem causes.
Report classifies patterns as keep/watch/revise/disable candidates.
Superadmin can run report manually in Telegram.
Monthly Telegram digest includes impact report on day 1.
HITL buttons support disable and active-pattern revision.
Relevant tests and production smoke checks pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
known_gaps: Detailed per-pattern history remains next stage.
